TAILSCALE_API_KEY.note: Use for device inventory and ACL or SSH policy automation.

TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY.note: Expires on 2026-07-07. Use for headless node join or re-auth, not admin policy edits.

NEO_ALERT_CHAT_ID.note: Used for ops alerts and runtime bundle delivery.

PC_AGENT_TOKEN.note: Used by remote desktop agents for Sora command execution.

GITHUB_PAT_YESOL_PILOT.purpose: Yesol-Pilot GitHub PAT for approved Yesol-Pilot/* repo operations
GITHUB_PAT_YESOL_PILOT.note: Primary GitHub token. Prefer PowerShell or Windows Credential Manager; Git Bash may not resolve the manager credential directly.

GITHUB_TOKEN.note: Authenticates as neogenesislab in current master credential map. Do not use for Yesol-Pilot/* work.

GITHUB_PAT.note: Authenticates as neogenesislab in current master credential map. Do not use for Yesol-Pilot/* work.
